The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

/Users/rishi/code/nova-scene/backend/ser.serviceRawFile:
service: nova-scene-backend

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs18.x
  region: ap-south-1
  memorySize: 512
  environment:
    SQS_QUEUE_URL: { Ref: NovaSceneRenderQueue }
    S3_DB_BUCKET: "novascene-db-1780577875"
    R2_ENDPOINT_URL: ${env:R2_ENDPOINT_URL, ''}
    R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID: ${env:R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID, ''}
    R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: ${env:R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, ''}
    R2_BUCKET_NAME: ${env:R2_BUCKET_NAME, ''}
    R2_CDN_URL: ${env:R2_CDN_URL, ''}
    RUNPOD_API_KEY: ${env:RUNPOD_API_KEY, ''}
    RUNPOD_FLUX_ENDPOINT_ID: ${env:RUNPOD_FLUX_ENDPOINT_ID, ''}
    RUNPOD_WAN_ENDPOINT_ID: ${env:RUNPOD_WAN_ENDPOINT_ID, ''}
    RUNPOD_LTX_ENDPOINT_ID: ${env:RUNPOD_LTX_ENDPOINT_ID, ''}
    RUNPOD_AUDIO_ENDPOINT_ID: ${env:RUNPOD_AUDIO_ENDPOINT_ID, ''}
    RUNPOD_LORA_ENDPOINT_ID: ${env:RUNPOD_LORA_ENDPOINT_ID, ''}
    OPENAI_API_KEY: ${env:OPENAI_API_KEY, ''}
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: "Allow"
          Action:
            - "sqs:SendMessage"
          Resource:
            - Fn::GetAtt: [ NovaSceneRenderQueue, Arn ]
        - Effect: "Allow"
          Action:
            - "s3:GetObject"
            - "s3:PutObject"
          Resource:
            - "arn:aws:s3:::novascene-db-1780577875/*"

plugins:
  - serverless-offline

functions:
  api:
    handler: src/lambda.handler
    events:
      - httpApi: '*'
  
  worker:
    handler: src/sqsWorker.handler
    timeout: 900 # 15 minutes max
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn:
            Fn::GetAtt:
              - NovaSceneRenderQueue
              - Arn

resources:
  Resources:
    NovaSceneRenderQueue:
      Type: "AWS::SQS::Queue"
      Properties:
        QueueName: "NovaSceneRenderQueue-${sls:stage}"
        VisibilityTimeout: 900 # 15 minutes, must match or exceed lambda timeout
